field: complex coefficients / characteristic zero as appropriate

general_Keller_noninvertibility.lower_bound_reason: a one-variable Keller map is affine
general_Keller_noninvertibility.upper_bound_reason: the certified foundational determinant-nonzero collision uses 3 variables

cubic_homogeneous_Keller_noninvertibilit.lower_bound_reason: dimension at most 2 has rank(JH)<=2, and the de Bondt--Sun rank-two theorem gives invertibility
cubic_homogeneous_Keller_noninvertibilit.upper_bound_reason: the essential cubic-homogeneous collision uses 21 variables

GMC_failure_real_Gaussian_dimension.upper_bound_reason: Long gives an explicit counterexample in 3 real Gaussian variables

SIC_failure_pair_dimension.lower_bound_reason: the one-pair Image Conjecture is proved
SIC_failure_pair_dimension.upper_bound_reason: the identity-output slice gives an explicit SIC(20) counterexample

ordinary_Laplacian_GVC_failure_dimension.lower_bound_reason: in one variable Delta(P)=0 forces deg(P)<=1, after which every fixed mixed derivative eventually vanishes
ordinary_Laplacian_GVC_failure_dimension.upper_bound_reason: the identity-output slice gives a 40-variable counterexample

homogeneous_quartic_HN_VC_failure_dimens.lower_bound_reason: the homogeneous symmetric nilpotent-Jacobian case is known through dimension five
homogeneous_quartic_HN_VC_failure_dimens.upper_bound_reason: the certified homogeneous HN quartic counterexample uses 42 variables

cubic_homogeneous_Jacobian_rank.lower_bound_reason: de Bondt--Sun prove every cubic-homogeneous Keller map with rank(JH)<=2 is invertible
cubic_homogeneous_Jacobian_rank.upper_bound_reason: the certified 24-variable circuit-level collision has exact generic rank(JH)=17

cubic_homogeneous_Jacobian_nilpotency_in.lower_bound_reason: index at most two gives a quasi-translation and hence an inverse; no full-class index-three theorem is recorded
cubic_homogeneous_Jacobian_nilpotency_in.upper_bound_reason: the certified 22-variable circuit-level collision has exact polynomial nilpotency index 18

homogeneous_quartic_Hessian_rank.lower_bound_reason: rank at most two reduces to the invertible cubic-homogeneous gradient case
homogeneous_quartic_Hessian_rank.upper_bound_reason: the certified 44-variable HN quartic has exact generic Hessian rank 37

two_real_cubic_four_weight_charts.consequence: a cubic GMC(2) counterexample has at least five rotational weights
two_real_cubic_four_weight_charts.status: exact closure of the four-weight cubic stratum

general_Keller_counterexample_total_degr.lower_reason: Wang's theorem proves every quadratic Keller map invertible
general_Keller_counterexample_total_degr.upper_reason: the certified 21-variable cubic-homogeneous collision has degree 3

Gaussian_moment_counterexample_total_deg.lower_reason: the quadratic Gaussian theorem in TWO_REAL_GMC_FRONTIER proves GMC for every polynomial of degree at most 2
Gaussian_moment_counterexample_total_deg.upper_reason: Long's explicit four-real-variable Gaussian counterexample is cubic

promotion_policy: Only exact identities or cited positive theorems change an endpoint; modular and bounded searches remain diagnostics.
